sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 12:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 12:1
items.html: Because they received their illumination from Shibolet HaZakan. However, the lower seven received their illumination only from the Hotem Peh, and therefore died. (Item 23)
